description: The dialect accepted by the open.mp-bundled compiler (3.10.11, or 3.10.12 for self-built), based on the pawn-lang/compiler lineage, including omp-stdlib expectations. Differs from samp-037 primarily in default include-guard generation (see dialectFlags and language/implementation-defined.md open question).

compiler.notes: open.mp ships its own compiler build; -Z flag or #pragma compat restores pawn-lang/compiler-compatible defaults where they diverge.

references.note: Source for automaticIncludeGuards default change; not independently re-verified against compiler source, see language/implementation-defined.md.
Standard include library this profile assumes is available.
